title: grewia orbifolia
intro: Grewia orbifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Grewia, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to various parts of the world including Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grewia orbifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Grewia orbifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat different health conditions.
